title: Adding / Inviting Guests to a shareable board via API
excerpt: I would like to invite guests to specific boards via API.

posts.author: BusinessAutopilot (Jörn Wilhelmi)
posts.cookedHtml: I would like to invite guests to specific boards via API.

posts.author: alessandra (Alessandra)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @BusinessAutopilot!

Have you tried using the Users API?

posts.author: henriquegirard (Henrique Girard)
posts.cookedHtml: I didn’t find a way to add guests via API

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @henriquegirard and welcome to the community!

The board needs to be a shareable board, and then you can use a mutation like this one to add the guest (the guest must be in your account already):

mutation {
  add_users_to_board (board_id: 1234567890, user_ids: 11223344, kind: subscriber) {
    id
  }
}

I hope that helps!

Cheers,
Matias
